name: sim-debug
description: Simulation debug cycle: compile → run → fix loop → report

tasks.detail: Run /compile tb_<module>.sv. Fix all compile errors (undeclared signals, port mismatches, missing includes) before running simulation.
Run /sim tb_<module>.sv. For each [FAIL]: check expected vs actual, grep RTL for signal driver, fix DUT or TB. DUT bugs → [SIM ESCALATE] rtl_gen.
Run /report. Verify: status=PASS, errors=0, warnings=0, all tests listed.
